title: Gallery
intro: Real salon work from Tyra Hair Studio: dimensional color, soft blonding, vivid transformations, gloss, cuts, and polished finishes.

collections.title: Ash blonde & gray blending
collections.description: Smoky blonde, silver ribbons, and soft gray blending with movement.

collections.title: Bright blondes & balayage
collections.description: Creamy blondes, ribbon highlights, and dimensional balayage finishes.

collections.title: Brunette, copper & gloss
collections.description: Lived-in brunette, copper melts, chocolate waves, and polished shine.

collections.title: Before & after transformations
collections.description: Side-by-side corrections, lifts, and color changes with clear results.

collections.title: Vivid color moments
collections.description: Red, pink, copper-orange, purple, blue, and lavender work for bolder salon moments.

collections.title: Bobs, cuts & detail shots
collections.description: Short bobs, clean necklines, compact shape, and polished silhouette work.
